text.title: Acceptance Criteria Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from artefact-state signal to the active rule.

decision-tree.root-question: criteria.length ≥ 1 AND every body length ≥ 16 chars?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite vague AC with concrete state
verify coverage_type spans ≥3 categories; hand off to QA

text.example: Required fields populated → named owner ≥2 tokens → version_tag semver → published.
